headline: Bitcoin Miners' AI Shift Sparks $1B Insider Sell-Off

article.title: Bitcoin miners’ AI pivot faces investor scrutiny over insider sales
article.summary: As AI-driven mining stocks retreat, investors are examining executive stock sales, governance and shareholder alignment across leading Bitcoin miners, according to Blocksbridge Consulting.

headline: UK Mulls Crypto Donation Ban Amid £1M Scandal

article.title: UK politicians mull permanent crypto donation ban in wake of Nigel Farage scandal
article.summary: Labour lawmakers proposed a full moratorium on crypto donations in March, which some have sought be made permanent after millions of dollars in contributions were linked to Reform leader Nigel Farage.

headline: Crude Drops 2% on Ease in US-Iran Tensions

article.title: Oil Falls as Traders Expect US-Iran Conflict Will Stay Contained
article.summary: Oil fell as traders priced in a limited US-Iran conflict, easing initial concerns that energy infrastructure would come under attack again.

article.title: Copper Rallies as Risk Assets Shrug Off More US Strikes on Iran
article.summary: Copper jumped during a broad rally for industrial metals as investors shrugged off a fresh round of US strikes on Iran to track broader gains in risk assets.

headline: Ethereum Deploys AI to Fix 50 Key Network Risks

article.title: Ethereum Foundation Turns AI Loose on ETH Network to Find Bugs Before Hackers Do
article.summary: Ethereum researchers are using AI agents to hunt for vulnerabilities, shifting security work from finding bugs to proving which ones are real.

headline: AI Boost: GPT-5.6 Debut Sends Crypto 8% Higher

article.title: OpenAI Releases GPT-5.6 Sol: Here’s How It Stacks Up Against Other AI Models
article.summary: OpenAI's new flagship model is out, after spending two weeks locked behind a government-approved preview. It lands the same week Fable 5 leaves Anthropic's subscription plans.

headline: CFTC Vacancies Delay $1T Crypto Bill Amid Defenses

article.title: White House defends Trump’s regulatory appointments as CFTC vacancies complicate crypto bill push
article.summary: The White House pushed back against Democrats’ criticism that the administration has declined to appoint commissioners to regulatory agencies.

headline: CFTC Faces Pressure to Reform Crypto Rules Now

article.title: Hyperliquid Policy Center, Phantom urge CFTC to stop treating onchain protocols like traditional brokers and exchanges
article.summary: The CFTC and Securities and Exchange Commission issued a Request for Information in mid-June on financial innovation.

article.summary: Late supreme leader set to be interred in Mashhad on Thursday
